cost_components_summary: Annualised appliance/HVAC/water-heating and other non-energy service-delivery cost excluding explicit commodity purchases. Carbon costs excluded.
input_basis_notes: Direct final-energy inputs only, normalised to the baseline service bundle. Electricity is entered as a final-energy commodity and should pick up grid emissions via the electricity-supply sector.
emissions_boundary_notes: Direct on-site emissions only. Electricity-related emissions are excluded from end-use coefficients and should be represented by electricity-supply methods to avoid double counting. Biogenic CO2 from biomass combustion is excluded from CO2e unless otherwise noted.
rollout_limit_notes: Indicative upper bound only; no explicit housing-stock rollover or retrofit segmentation in Phase 1.
availability_conditions: Available in all milestone years; interpreted as aggregate service-delivery archetypes rather than individual technologies.
evidence_summary: Baseline fuel shares are anchored to official Australian energy statistics; electrification direction is informed by AEMO and method electrification evidence.
derivation_method: Hybrid. 2025 incumbent coefficients are matched to official sector fuel shares. Prospective methods apply electrification and efficiency reductions consistent with Australian electrification studies, smoothed across milestone years.
review_notes: The most aggressive near-zero-direct-emissions commercial service method in Phase 1.
candidate_expansion_pathway: Split into space conditioning, water heating, cooking and appliances, with new-build versus retrofit variants.
times_or_vedalang_mapping_notes: Each reduced-form method can later map to multiple end-use technologies in a TIMES demand module, potentially using useful-energy service demands and stock-rollover dynamics.
